_comment: Mock weather data for simulation mode (MOCK_MODE=true). Edit this file to test different alert scenarios without hitting the live NWS API. Place this file at /app/mock_weather.json inside the container.

active_alerts.headline: Tornado Warning issued April 5 at 6:45PM CDT until April 5 at 7:30PM CDT by NWS Austin/San Antonio TX
active_alerts.description: THE NATIONAL WEATHER SERVICE IN AUSTIN/SAN ANTONIO HAS ISSUED A TORNADO WARNING FOR CENTRAL TRAVIS COUNTY IN SOUTH CENTRAL TEXAS. AT 644 PM CDT, A SEVERE THUNDERSTORM CAPABLE OF PRODUCING A TORNADO WAS LOCATED NEAR PFLUGERVILLE, MOVING NORTHEAST AT 35 MPH. HAZARD: TORNADO. SOURCE: RADAR INDICATED. IMPACT: FLYING DEBRIS WILL BE DANGEROUS TO THOSE CAUGHT WITHOUT SHELTER. MOBILE HOMES WILL BE DAMAGED OR DESTROYED. DAMAGE TO ROOFS, WINDOWS, AND VEHICLES WILL OCCUR. TREE DAMAGE IS LIKELY.
active_alerts.instruction: TAKE COVER NOW! Move to a basement or an interior room on the lowest floor of a sturdy building. Avoid windows. If you are outdoors, in a mobile home, or in a vehicle, move to the closest substantial shelter and protect yourself from flying debris.

active_alerts.headline: Severe Thunderstorm Warning issued April 5 at 6:30PM CDT until April 5 at 7:15PM CDT by NWS Austin/San Antonio TX
active_alerts.description: AT 629 PM CDT, A SEVERE THUNDERSTORM WAS LOCATED NEAR ROUND ROCK, MOVING NORTHEAST AT 40 MPH. HAZARD: 70 MPH WIND GUSTS AND QUARTER SIZE HAIL. SOURCE: RADAR INDICATED. IMPACT: HAIL DAMAGE TO VEHICLES IS EXPECTED. EXPECT CONSIDERABLE TREE DAMAGE. WIND DAMAGE IS ALSO LIKELY TO MOBILE HOMES, ROOFS, AND OUTBUILDINGS.
active_alerts.instruction: For your protection move to an interior room on the lowest floor of a building.

active_alerts.headline: Flash Flood Warning issued April 5 at 6:15PM CDT until April 5 at 9:00PM CDT by NWS Austin/San Antonio TX
active_alerts.description: THE NATIONAL WEATHER SERVICE HAS ISSUED A FLASH FLOOD WARNING FOR BARTON CREEK AND ONION CREEK IN TRAVIS COUNTY. HEAVY RAINFALL OF 3 TO 5 INCHES HAS ALREADY FALLEN. AN ADDITIONAL 1 TO 2 INCHES IS EXPECTED. TURN AROUND, DON'T DROWN.
active_alerts.instruction: Move to higher ground now. Act quickly to protect your life.
